actions.enabled_when: payload.validation_report is present and payload.refusal is null
actions.disabled_reason: No validation report is present in the command result.
actions.refusal_behavior: Disabled when the source command result has no report; future runtime action must return a typed command refusal.
actions.evidence_behavior: Reads evidence references from the existing validation result; does not create new evidence.

actions.enabled_when: evidence array is non-empty or payload.evidence_packet is present
actions.disabled_reason: No evidence references are present in the command result.
actions.refusal_behavior: Disabled when evidence is absent; future export command must emit typed refusal for unsupported destinations.
actions.evidence_behavior: Exports or references the existing evidence packet; this slice does not implement export handlers.

actions.disabled_reason: The original command request is not available.
actions.refusal_behavior: Rerun uses the existing dominium.validation.run refusal policy.
actions.evidence_behavior: Rerun produces a new command result and evidence packet through dominium.validation.run.
